cardTitle: Quilted Padded Neoprene Makeup Bag With Custom Embossed Logo
cardSubtitle: OEM Custom Embossed Logo · Multiple Colors Available
logo: Embossed Logo, Silk Screen Printing, Heat Transfer Printing, Custom Logo Method Available
application: Travel, Daily Makeup Storage, Beauty Organization, Toiletry Storage, Promotional Gifts, Retail Sales, Brand Merchandise
title: Soft Neoprene Purple Cosmetic Travel Pouch
seoTitle: Quilted Padded Waterproof Neoprene Makeup Bag Custom Embossed Logo for Travel
description:
Premium Soft Neoprene Material
Made of high-density soft-touch neoprene, this cosmetic pouch features waterproof, stain-resistant and easy-to-clean performance. Any liquid makeup spill can be wiped off in seconds, ideal for daily bathroom use and travel trips. The lightweight fabric brings no extra burden to your handbag or luggage.
Quilted Padded Shockproof Design
Unique 3-section stitched padded structure adds soft buffer protection for fragile cosmetics like makeup brushes, liquid lipsticks, compact powder and skincare bottles. It prevents your beauty essentials from squeezing, scratching or breaking during travel. We offer solid color options including lavender purple, chocolate brown, mint green and custom Pantone colors.
 Custom Embossed Logo Service
We provide embossed/debossed logo craft on the front surface, matching your brand identity perfectly. No complicated film fees for simple text or graphic logos. Private label, custom zipper puller and customized bag size are all acceptable to build your exclusive beauty pouch line.
seoDescription: Padded shockproof neoprene makeup bag with custom embossed logo, easy-clean waterproof material. Portable travel cosmetic pouch in lavender purple, ideal for daily beauty storage.
